Uses of Class
DelaunayTriangle

  • Uses of DelaunayTriangle in Unnamed Package

    Methods in Unnamed Package that return types with arguments of type DelaunayTriangle
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<DelaunayTriangle>
    Delaunay.getTriangles()
    Returns the current triangles of the triangulation.
    List<DelaunayTriangle>
    MapManager.getTriangles()
    Returns the most recently computed list of Delaunay triangles.
    List<DelaunayTriangle>
    Delaunay.triangulate(List<Hospital> hospitals)
    Builds the Delaunay triangulation from a list of hospitals.
    Methods in Unnamed Package with parameters of type DelaunayTriangle
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    DelaunayTriangle.sharesEdgeWith(DelaunayTriangle other)
    Checks whether this triangle shares an edge with another triangle.
    void
    TriangleDetailView.show(DelaunayTriangle t, Map<Patient,Hospital> assignments)
    Opens the triangle detail window.
    Method parameters in Unnamed Package with type arguments of type DelaunayTriangle
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<VoronoiEdge>
    VoronoiService.getVoronoiEdges(List<DelaunayTriangle> triangles)
    Produces one Voronoi edge for each pair of adjacent Delaunay triangles.
    List<Coordinate>
    VoronoiService.getVoronoiVertices(List<DelaunayTriangle> triangles)
    Extracts one Voronoi vertex per Delaunay triangle by computing each circumcenter.
